notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo grounds into a double play, second baseman Gleyber Torres to shortstop Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Geraldo Perdomo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Torkelson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Torkelson grounds into a double play, third baseman Jose Fernandez to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Carlos Santana. Kerry Carpenter out at 2nd. Spencer Torkelson out at 1st.
